str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - tech-blogging-tips
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Learn to Code by Starting Your Own Tech Blog
entry.summary: In today's digital age, coding has become an essential skill that is in high demand across various industries. However, for beginners looking to learn how to code, it can be both exciting and overwhelming. That's where starting your own tech blog comes into the picture! This 8000-character blog post explores ten ways that starting a tech blog can help individuals learn how to code, regardless of their programming experience level. From choosing user-friendly content management systems like WordPress or Squarespace to collaborating with other coders, this post offers practical tips and resources for those interested in embarking on the coding journey through their own tech blogs. With consistent practice and a commitment to learning, anyone can become a proficient coder by following these ten tips. So why not take the first step today and start your own tech blog? The possibilities are endless!
